title: Brixel
description: Bring your favourite bricks to Minecraft!
body:
![Brixel Resource Pack - Nature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17bf9f41f53c061ea7860c5e2bc18abfd791cfae.jpeg)

**Brixel 3.2 x64 - available for FREE**

**Brixel 3.2 x128-x512 - available at www.patreon.com/wabbabrick**

**ABOUT BRIXEL**

Transform your Minecraft world into a breathtaking universe made entirely of tiny bricks with Brixel, a resource pack like no other! Inspired by the iconic toy bricks we all know and love, Brixel brings an entirely new dimension to Minecraft's visuals while preserving the classic vanilla feel.

![Desert Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77a76f31a9281f037506b091a65da2981ac6db52.jpeg)

**What Makes Brixel Unique?**

Every block in Brixel is meticulously redesigned into a Brixel—a cube built from countless intricate 3D elements (brick-pixels). These tiny bricks vary in shape and layer, creating a stunning mosaic of depth, detail, and texture. Each block retains the essence of its original purpose but with a fresh, imaginative twist.

With Brixel, you're not just playing Minecraft—you're building in a living, breathing brick world.

![Blue Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85209dce6017ca0e83dee23e888315e83d26aa09.jpeg)

**Features:**

A World Made of Tiny Bricks: Immerse yourself in the ultimate brick-building adventure like never before.
Cutting-Edge Performance: Advanced techniques like Parallax Occlusion Mapping simulate complex geometry while optimizing performance.
Shader Compatibility: Designed for use with BSL Shaders v8.2+, bringing vibrant lighting and stunning realism.
Multiple Resolutions: Choose from 64x, 128x, 256x, or 512x versions to match your system’s capabilities.
Custom Sounds: Hear satisfying "rattling" and "clicking" sounds as bricks are placed, broken, or walked on. Footsteps and interactions have never sounded this good!
Exclusive Items: Discover unique items like the Wabbabrick, a specialized pickaxe mod, and more surprises throughout your gameplay.

![Pillar of Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c6f447029be9a53c52df4929573e5c10d8b24df.jpeg)

**Why Brixel?**

Whether you're running the lightweight 64x version or the ultra-detailed 512x edition, Brixel offers the same incredible features across all resolutions. The pack is currently 95% complete, with constant updates bringing you closer to a fully immersive brick world.

The showcased screenshots and videos highlight the 512x resolution version with SEUS PTGI HRR Test 2.1 shader (temporarily unsupported). Regardless of your setup, Brixel guarantees a fresh and engaging aesthetic for every player.

**Installation:**

To get started, ensure you have the latest version of Optifine installed alongside BSL Shaders v8.2+ for optimal performance. Detailed installation instructions are included with the pack to ensure your game looks and feels exactly as it should.

Need help? Follow the step-by-step video tutorial here or consult the attached PDF guide.

Dive into Brixel today and reimagine Minecraft as a world of endless brick-building creativity!
